1 #include "swarmus_ros_simulation/interCommunication.h"
2 
3 InterCommunication::InterCommunication() {
4  ROS_INFO("HiveMind communication initialization");
5 
6  m_robotName = Simulation::getParamRobotName();
7 
8  m_publisher =
9  m_nodeHandle.advertise<swarmus_ros_simulation::Communication>("communication", 1000);
10  m_subscriber = m_nodeHandle.subscribe("/CommunicationBroker/" + m_robotName, 1000,
11  &InterCommunication::communicationCallback, this);
12 }
13 
14 void InterCommunication::publish(const swarmus_ros_simulation::Communication& msg) {
15  m_publisher.publish(msg);
16 }
17 
18 void InterCommunication::communicationCallback(const std_msgs::String::ConstPtr& msg) {
19  // DO SOMETHING AT MESSAGE RECEPTION
20 }
21 
22 std::string InterCommunication::getRobotName() { return m_robotName; }
23 
24 int main(int argc, char** argv) {
25  ros::init(argc, argv, "hiveboard_interCommunications");
26 
27  InterCommunication interCommunication;
28  std::string m_robotName = interCommunication.getRobotName();
29 
30  // Send message each second
31  ros::Rate loop_rate(1);
32 
33  // For current implementation, pioneer_1 only will send a message to pioneer_1.
34  while (ros::ok()) {
35  swarmus_ros_simulation::Communication msg;
36  if (m_robotName == "pioneer_1") {
37  msg.source_robot = m_robotName;
38  msg.target_robot = Simulation::Communication::allRobotsExceptSelf;
39  msg.message = m_robotName + " say hello.";
40 
41  // ROS_INFO("%s", msg.data.c_str());
42 
43  interCommunication.publish(msg);
44  }
45 
46  ros::spinOnce();
47  loop_rate.sleep();
48  }
49  return 0;
50 };
